brief.objective: introduce CALL as a leadership development and improvement planning tool
keyMessages: CALL provides a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
CALL supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL focuses on leadership, improvement, and the work.
proofPoints: The CALL homepage describes CALL as a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system.
The CALL site says CALL provides unique tools and customized services for professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
The What We Do page says CALL is school- and district-wide.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a one-page flyer with a strong headline, short audience framing, three concise support blocks, a source-grounded proof point, and one clear CTA.

headlineOptions: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement.
Leadership for learning, grounded in feedback
A practical system for school improvement planning
Turn school-wide feedback into improvement planning
subheadOptions: CALL is a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
The Comprehensive Assessment of Leadership for Learning supports professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
CALL helps principals use practice-based feedback to guide leadership conversations and improvement planning.
copy.body: CALL helps principals bring leadership for learning into school improvement planning. This school-wide leadership assessment and feedback system gathers educator input on critical leadership practices and provides actionable formative feedback, including customized strategies and action plans for school improvement.
bullets: Use a school-wide needs assessment and feedback system designed for school improvement.
Gather educator input on critical leadership practices across the school.
Connect feedback to professional growth, leadership development, and improvement planning.
Use customized strategies and action plans to support practical next steps.

fittedCopy.headline: Focus on leadership. Focus on improvement.
fittedCopy.deck: CALL is a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.
proofPoints: It gathers educator input on critical leadership practices across the school.
It connects feedback to professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: large campaign headline with compact support proof
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: full-bleed branded atmosphere cropped into the composition
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: left-led editorial stack with proof band integrated below

designRecipe.hierarchy: large campaign headline, concise deck, two proof points, and compact CTA owned entirely by the app
designRecipe.artDirection: confident CALL campaign flyer for principals: an editorial split pairing a calm, readable message field with a right-side school leadership visual story—educators in purposeful collaboration, subtle assessment/data feedback cues, and a forward-looking improvement atmosphere in CALL-aligned blues and warm neutrals
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: shape the left text area with negative space, soft light falloff, and subject cropping; imply hierarchy without drawing boxes, cards, or any readable content
designRecipe.appComposition: official logo anchors top-left; app typesets the left-led headline, deck, proof band, and lower CTA over a clean editorial field while full-bleed artwork carries the right side and subtly guides attention back to the message
promptDirectives: Create a complete 4:5 campaign flyer concept, not a decorative background.
Keep the left zone calm and readable for app-owned copy and logo.
Make the right-field visual about school leadership, educator feedback, and improvement planning.
Use light, crop, and motion to integrate art with the lower proof/CTA rhythm.
Do not generate fake text, logos, contact bars, blank panels, placeholder boxes, or UI modules.

CALL is a user-friendly school-wide needs assessment and feedback system for school improvement.

imageResults.revisedPrompt:
Create a portrait full-bleed campaign art plate, 1024x1536, for an education-sector leadership flyer aimed at school principals. This is a text-free design comp background/art plate that an app will later typeset: no readable text, no letters, no numbers, no labels, no logos, no marks, no icons, no UI, no badges, no document panels, no charts.

Composition: editorial split with calm readable left zone and visual storytelling right field. Left 40–45% should be a clean, softly lit negative-space field with subtle texture and gentle falloff, high enough contrast for future dark teal typography and an official logo placed by the app at top-left. Do not draw boxes or panels; imply hierarchy through light, depth, and crop only. Keep the left zone uncluttered but premium, not empty washed-out white.

Right field: authentic editorial photography / refined realistic campaign visual of school leadership and improvement planning. Show a principal with a small leadership team in a reflective planning conversation, reviewing feedback reports and school improvement notes, data-informed but without readable text or visible charts. Avoid corporate boardroom, generic PD workshop, random classroom stock, posed training-room clichés, close-up faces, and detailed hands. Figures should be cropped and naturally integrated, with faces not too close or overly detailed. Use over-the-shoulder/candid composition, layered depth, soft motion, and foreground/background blur. Props may include papers, notebooks, sticky-note-like color blocks, and planning materials, but all must be abstract/blurred with no legible writing.

Mood and brand palette: steady, clear, leadership-oriented, reflective, strategic, credible, calm. Use deep navy #142836, teal #0081A4, growth green #5EA974, warm accent #F2975E as atmospheric accents, not as logos or shapes. Polished NY media/ad-agency quality, premium education storytelling, rich visual density on the right, type-safe contrast on the left. Integrate visual energy downward toward where a compact proof band and CTA may later sit, but do not render any CTA or band. Keep important visual energy away from trim/crop edges. Full designed concept, intentional crop, layered depth, subtle school environment cues, leadership-for-learning and professional growth atmosphere.

Strict negatives: absolutely no readable text, letters, numbers, fake paragraphs, book titles, publisher names, email addresses, URLs, phone numbers, citations, lorem ipsum, CALL logo, wordmark, brand initials, logo-like mark, chevron/mountain mark, arrow mark, background logo pattern, official seals, badges, CTA buttons, headlines, labels, fake dashboards, fake UI, cards, brochure scaffolding, document layouts, blank placeholder boxes, contact bars, invented claims, endorsement imagery, malformed hands, close-up detailed hands.

logoAsset.label: Horizontal full color · transparent · light/image backgrounds

request.goal: introduce CALL as a leadership development and improvement planning tool
request.topic: leadership for learning, professional growth, and school improvement planning

sourceEvidence.excerpt: CALL provides unique tools and customized services to support professional growth, leadership development, and school improvement planning.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL professional growth and planning

sourceEvidence.excerpt: CALL is a school- and district-wide leadership assessment and feedback system.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL assessment and feedback system

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The CALL Team offers tools and services to support district-wide school improvement work.
sourceEvidence.label: CALL Standard System

sourceEvidence.excerpt: CALL provides actionable formative feedback including customized strategies and action plans for school improvement.
sourceEvidence.label: Improvement-focused feedback
